message:
chore(deps): bump toml to 1.1 and update Cargo.lock

- toml: 1.0 → 1.1 (config file parsing dependency)
- asupersync: 0.2.7 → 0.2.9 (adds crossbeam-deque, hashbrown,
  wasm-bindgen support)
- cc: 1.2.57 → 1.2.59
- Various transitive dependency updates in lockfile

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
